summary: Tested Performance Tracker restructured features: Lead target_closure_month/year fields, Revenue section with 3 overridable rows (lifetime/this_month/from_new_accounts), Account Metrics from accounts collection, Pipeline status-wise table. All backend API tests passed (7/7). All frontend UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing plan and resource from target-plans API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker restructured features fully tested. Backend: /api/performance/generate returns revenue.lifetime, revenue.this_month, revenue.from_new_accounts, pipeline.by_status, pipeline.total_value, pipeline.next_month_leads_count, accounts from accounts collection. Frontend: PerformanceTracker.js has OverridableRow component for revenue rows with data-testid: revenue-lifetime, revenue-this-month, revenue-new-accounts (with -edit, -input, -save, -reset suffixes). Pipeline section has data-testid='pipeline-status-table' with columns: Status, No of Leads, Pipeline Value. Account tiles have data-testid='existing-accounts-tile' and 'new-accounts-tile' that open Dialog popup. Lead edit form has data-testid='lead-target-closure-month-select' and 'lead-target-closure-year-select'.

Lead_Target_Closure_Month_Field.details: Lead edit form shows Target Closure Month dropdown with data-testid='lead-target-closure-month-select'

Lead_Target_Closure_Year_Field.details: Lead edit form shows Target Closure Year dropdown with data-testid='lead-target-closure-year-select'

Lead_Update_API_Target_Closure.details: PUT /api/leads/{id} accepts and persists target_closure_month and target_closure_year

Lead_Create_API_Target_Closure.details: POST /api/leads accepts target_closure_month and target_closure_year on create

Revenue_Lifetime_Row.details: Revenue section shows 'Revenue Lifetime (As-on-date)' with pencil icon for override

Revenue_This_Month_Row.details: Revenue section shows 'Revenue This Month (All Accounts)' with pencil icon for override

Revenue_New_Accounts_Row.details: Revenue section shows 'Revenue from New Accounts This Month' with pencil icon for override

Revenue_Edit_Icons.details: All 3 revenue rows have pencil edit icons with data-testid: revenue-lifetime-edit, revenue-this-month-edit, revenue-new-accounts-edit

Account_Metrics_Existing_Lifetime.details: Account Metrics tile shows 'Existing (Lifetime)' from accounts collection with data-testid='existing-accounts-tile'

Account_Metrics_New_This_Month.details: Account Metrics tile shows 'New This Month' based on onboarded_month/year with data-testid='new-accounts-tile'

Account_Tiles_Dialog_Popup.details: Clicking account tiles opens Dialog popup with data-testid='accounts-dialog' showing account list

Pipeline_Status_Table.details: Pipeline section shows status-wise table with columns: Status, No of Leads, Pipeline Value

Pipeline_Excludes_Statuses.details: Pipeline excludes won, active_customer, not_qualified, lost statuses (verified via backend test)

Pipeline_Next_Month_Leads.details: Pipeline shows 'Leads Targeting Next Month' count and 'Next Month Pipeline Value'

Summary_Cards_Labels.details: Summary cards show updated labels: REVENUE (MONTH), PIPELINE with leads count

Backend_Accounts_From_Collection.details: /api/performance/generate returns accounts from accounts collection (not leads)
